chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. D – 20 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 13-07-2022 Mr. Ali Akbar Shar, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Comments have been filed by SSP Khairpur, SHO (Police Station Faiz Ganj) and Incharge (Police Picket Akri), respondents No.2, 3 and 4, respectively. In the comments of SSP Khairpur, it is mentioned that alleged detenu namely Iqbal alias Baboo Halepoto has been arrested by Ranipur Police in FIR No. 76/2022, registered at Police Station Ranipur, for offence under Section 9(c) of Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 1997, and presently he is in judicial custody. In the view of above, counsel for the applicant does not press the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application anymore, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
